productDisplayName: Nike Men Cricket Off White T-shirt
description: Composition Off white polo T-shirt for men made of 100% polyester, has a collar with a slit v-neckline, short sleeves and nike swoosh embroidered on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with comfort in this T-shirt from nike. The polyester material keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
